entrypoints.notes: Operator CLI entrypoint; delegates to init_operator_run + run_workflow + validate_operator_run and prints envelope-derived summary.
User-facing executable wrapper that delegates to scripts/operator_run.py.
Workflow runner; emits canonical envelope artifacts for contract_version>=1.2.0 completed/failed runs.
CI operator surface summary; emits durable artifacts under runs/_operator_surface/ci_last/ including envelope.
OpenClaw-ready guarded snapshot cycle; emits JSON audit plus canonical envelope under runs/_operator_surface/snapshot_cycle_last/.
Financial control-loop wrapper; emits JSON audit plus canonical envelope under runs/_operator_surface/financial_cycle_last/.
Weekly refresh wrapper; emits JSON audit plus canonical envelope under runs/_operator_surface/weekly_cycle_last/.
Thin target; delegates only to wrapped scripts/operator_run.py.

Scaffolding-only (Option A): thin target over scripts/init_operator_run.py. Creates runs/ skeleton and manifest template only — not an operator completion or envelope surface. Excluded from Phase 3 envelope completion criteria; not counted as active_unwrapped debt.
Thin target; delegates only to wrapped scripts/run_workflow.py (enforced in CI).
Thin target; delegates only to wrapped scripts/operator_emit_ci_summary.py (enforced in CI).
Contract validation helper for runs/; not an operator narrative emitter.
Phase gate JSON to stdout; CI signal, not operator envelope surface.
Run index builder for tooling/CI.
Unit test discovery for scripts/tests.
Meta-check for inventory and static delegation needles; not operator output.
Single regression gate runner (tests + eval pack + FN audit + CLI smoke).
Local/CI harness; orchestrates validators and wrapped emitters.
Inventory and static delegation enforcement.
Run scaffold creation; templates only, not canonical operator response surface.
Contract enforcement over runs/ trees.
Phase gate evaluator; JSON artifact for CI.
Markdown input to CI surface emitter; not a standalone envelope surface.
Indexing utility for runs/.
Allowlist policy checks over run artifacts.
